chapter_title.en: Chapter 123 – The Tawaaf and touching the corners

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/24)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/24)
text: الرُّكْنُ الْيَمَانِيُّ بَابٌ مِنْ أَبْوَابِ الْجَنَّةِ لَمْ يُغْلِقْهُ اللَّهُ مُنْذُ فَتَحَهُ
وَ فِي رِوَايَةٍ أُخْرَى بَابُنَا إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ الَّذِي مِنْهُ نَدْخُلُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Muawiya Bin Ammar,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The Yamani corner is a Door from the Doors of the Paradise. Allah<sup>azwj</sup> did not Lock it since He<sup>azwj</sup> Opened it’.
And in another report, ‘(He<sup>asws</sup> said): ‘It is our<sup>asws</sup> Door to the Paradise from which we<sup>asws</sup> enter’.
en.sarwar: 13. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Mu‘awiyah ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that al-Yemaniy corner is a door of the doors of paradise. Allah has not closed it from the day He opened it.” In another Hadith it says, “It is our door to paradise through which we enter.”
